name: skin-xp
title: Windows XP skin
description: Skeuomorphic Windows XP (Luna) concept skin for shadcn/ui: beveled putty controls, navy title gradient, blue selection. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="xp"].
docs: 1) @import "./skins/xp.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="xp" on <html>. Components are unchanged.
